Invoice #4821 — ACME Corporation: Billed to ACME Corp, 123 Industrial Blvd, Springfield, for professional services rendered in October 2023. Line items include software licensing ($12,500), implementation support (40 hours at $200/hr = $8,000), and a one-time setup fee of $1,500. Total amount due: $22,000, payable within 30 days of receipt. Please remit payment via wire transfer to account details on file.
